project: Integrated Policy, Claims, and Payments Platform

features.name: User Authentication & Authorization
features.description: JWT-based authentication with role-based access control
components: User registration with email and password

features.name: Policy Management
features.description: Complete policy lifecycle management with search and CRUD operations
components: Create new policies with complete details
Search policies by multiple criteria (policy number, name, location, SSN/TIN, etc.)
Retrieve policy details with masked SSN/TIN
Support for vehicle details and coverage information
Audit logging for all policy actions

features.name: Claims Management
features.description: Comprehensive claims processing and tracking linked to policies
components: Search claims with filters (claim number, policy, status, loss date range)
Claim-level policy data for unverified policies
Injury incident and coding information support
Claims history sorted by loss date (most recent first)
Audit logging for all claim actions

features.name: Payment & Disbursement Management
features.description: Full payment lifecycle with multiple payment methods and security
components: Create payments linked to claims and policies
Multiple payment methods (ACH, wire, card, Stripe, global payout)
Payment lifecycle (pending, approved, issued, void, reversed)
Tax reportable designation with encrypted tax ID
Audit logging for all payment actions

features.name: Vendor Management
features.description: Vendor/claimant onboarding with KYC and payment method verification
components: Encrypted tax ID and banking information

features.name: Security & Data Protection
features.description: Comprehensive security measures for sensitive data
components: SSN/TIN masking in responses (show only last 4 digits)

features.name: Audit Logging
features.description: Comprehensive audit trail for all business operations
components: Track entity type, entity ID, action, user ID

features.name: Exception Handling
features.description: Typed exception hierarchy with proper HTTP status codes

features.name: Middleware & Observability
features.description: Request logging and correlation ID tracking
components: Request method, path, status code, and duration logging

features.name: Health Checks & Monitoring
features.description: Liveness and readiness probes for container orchestration
components: Readiness probe with database connectivity check (/health/ready)
Graceful startup and shutdown with lifespan management

features.name: Database Management
features.description: Async SQLAlchemy with SQLite for development
components: Automatic table creation in development mode
